creator: herbert@gojira.at
text:
% cd databases.orig/db51/
% make fetch
===>  License check disabled, port has not defined LICENSE
=> db-5.1.19.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/bdb.

fetch: http://download-west.oracle.com/berkeley-db/db-5.1.19.tar.gz: Moved Permanently
=> Attempting to fetch from http://download-east.oracle.com/berkeley-db/.
fetch: http://download-east.oracle.com/berkeley-db/db-5.1.19.tar.gz: Moved Permanently
=> Attempting to fetch from http://download-uk.oracle.com/berkeley-db/.
fetch: http://download-uk.oracle.com/berkeley-db/db-5.1.19.tar.gz: Moved Permanently
=> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/bdb/.
db-5.1.19.tar.gz                              100% of   29 MB 1114 kBps 00m00s

Fix: The attached patch updates MASTER_SITES for databases/db[345] ports.

Patch attached with submission follows:
